data.asset_specific_notes: General: Apply Fidenza framework rules. Risk 0.75-2.0% of capital per trade. Use swing-based stops when available.

fidenza_framework.rule_1: Risk 0.75-2.0% of capital per trade (0.7-1.0% for ES swings)
fidenza_framework.rule_2: Stop = recent swing low/high (1-3 days prior)
fidenza_framework.rule_3: Position size inversely proportional to stop width
fidenza_framework.rule_4: Trail stop to breakeven after 1R profit
fidenza_framework.rule_5: Cut before stop when thesis deteriorates
fidenza_framework.rule_6: Tighten all stops during regime shift to risk-off
fidenza_framework.rule_9: Re-enter after stops if thesis intact
fidenza_framework.rule_10: Adapt sizing to volatility regime -- higher vol = wider stop + smaller size
